element_introduction_order.element: Yuko Asou (main character with Valis sword)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Chargeable energy wave attacks, strongest physical fighter of the three characters
Foundation for level traversal throughout game
Strategic tool for level progression; forced character assignments on some stages
Whip attacks with different arc than Yuko's sword; mid-tier magic ability
Strongest magic user with magical blasts (lightning, fire, ice); weakest physical attack
New mobility/combat technique unique to Valis III
Character selection affects cutscene and strategy; no mid-fight switching allowed
Exploration rewards; upgradable weapons per character

element_introduction_order.element: King Glames (primary antagonist with Leethus sword)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Story context early, boss encounter late-game
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Climactic final boss; represents inverse of Yuko's Valis sword
Enables climactic battle capability; leads to game's ending

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Story context, boss encounter final stage
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Co-final boss with Glames; series continuity element

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections between enemy groups
typical_tension_triggers: Boss encounter at end of level
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Stage-driven tension with narrative punctuation; boss encounters provide clear tension peaks; character acquisition and story progression gates create mid-game pacing variations

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Item and power-up placement off main path rewards exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of Yuko solo with basic platforming and enemy encounters; establishes control and combat fundamentals
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Character switching unlocked with Cham and Valna acquisition; increased enemy complexity and stage variety; Genesis version features more similar level design across stages
difficulty_curve.late_game: Story-driven progression through Vecanti; climactic encounters with Glames and Rogles; full Valis sword potential unlocked for final confrontation
notable_spikes: Final Glames/Rogles dual boss (narrative and mechanical climax)

notable_level_patterns.description: Some stages force the player to use a specific character, typically Yuko; creates focused mechanical experiences tied to narrative context
Each level culminates in a boss fight; defeating boss advances narrative and story progression (rescues, world visits, power unlocks)
Genesis version improved parallax scrolling backgrounds; creates depth perception during horizontal navigation
Levels contain collectible items and power-ups requiring exploration off main path; optional but rewards initiative
